themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.

themes.label: Love
themes.summary: This chapter foregrounds love, affection, covenant loyalty, or sacrificial care.

themes.label: Suffering
themes.summary: This chapter deals with affliction, sorrow, trial, lament, endurance, or hardship.
